examples: We sat in the shade of a willow tree.
She was slender as a willow shoot is slender.
...the descendant branches of a weeping willow...
The interior was comparted by willow screens.
The path was overhung with willow trees.
example_translate: Она была тоненькая, как ивовый прутик.
Внутри помещение было разделено ивовыми ширмами.
